name: code4me
description: Multi-agent SDLC framework with Producer-as-orchestrator: classifies workflow weight (Trivial, Conversation, Light, Standard, Critical), dispatches specialist subagents, enforces quality gates and auto-escalation, routes INSIGHT messages upstream. Standard/Critical milestones decompose into ≥1 task per acceptance criterion (v0.12). Vendor-aware model tiers (low / mid / high) and opt-in three-vendor pairing across Anthropic + OpenAI (codex-bridge) + DeepSeek (deepseek-bridge, v0.11+). Four runtime hooks (test-protection, conversation-mode forbidden-conditions, critical-mode write-allowlist, LSP-first-on-source). Trello sync projects per-AC state to a Kanban board (one card per acceptance criterion, v0.12).
